General.Name: Tai Kam Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Tai Kam Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, undertakes site formation and renovation works in Hong Kong. Its site formation works include the piling, landslip preventive, and remedial works for improving or maintaining the stability of slopes and/or retaining walls; and fitting out works for premises. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Dah Sing Life Building, Central, Hong Kong
